description: You are a vehicle dynamics engineer at an autonomous public transit company. A 2,000 kg campus shuttle model ('SHUTTLE') has been imported into Webots, but its joints and motors have unconstrained placeholder values. Configure the physical joint constraints and motor actuation limits to match the vehicle's hardware capabilities. For both front steering joints ('fl_steer' and 'fr_steer'), set 'minStop' to -0.65, 'maxStop' to 0.65, and 'maxVelocity' to 1.5. For both rear drive actuators ('rl_drive' and 'rr_drive'), set 'maxVelocity' to 15.0 and 'maxTorque' to 350.0. Save the corrected world to /home/ga/Desktop/shuttle_dynamics.wbt.
